name: mojo-nd-slice-fast-path
description: Add a contiguous-memcpy fast-path for N-D tensor slices where only the first axis is non-trivially sliced. Use when: (1) profiling shows __getitem__(*slices) is a bottleneck in batch-extraction loops, (2) adding first-axis-only fast-path to an ExTensor-style type-erased tensor, (3) preserving a slow-path fallback for non-contiguous slice patterns.
